name: SUBY
description: Suby is an on-chain crypto payment processor built for paid communities in betting, trading, and alpha groups on Discord and Telegram. Accept USDC, USDT, ETH, SOL & BNB across multiple chains and monetize your group with customizable subscription plans, flexible pricing, billing cycles, free trials, and discounts. Suby’s automated bot grants or removes Discord roles and Telegram access instantly based on payment status. Manage members, track revenue, and reduce churn with our centralized dashboard, the all-in-one solution for secure, low-fee crypto recurring payments in high-value communities.
